programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Until Proven Innocent: Quirky detective drama with Lori Loughlin. An antiques expert with a knack for sleuthing investigates a murder case when her friend is accused of killing her fiancé. (2016)

Thriller based on real-life events, with Karis Cameron. A student gets caught in an admission scandal in a bid to get into a good college. A manhunt for the ring leader has deadly consequences. (2021)
A novelist's daughter is taken in a copycat abduction with an obsessive assistant intent on stealing her identity. Starring Chelsea Hobbs. (2018)

Looks Can Kill: Dr Sloan investigates when a healthy, young woman dies in suspicious circumstances. Is her death linked to a plastic surgery clinic?

programmes.show_name: White Hot: A Sandra Brown Mystery
programmes.show_description: Mystery thriller with Shenae Grimes-Beech. After her brother's sudden death, Sayre returns to the town and family she escaped a decade ago, to turn it all upside down to find the truth... (2016)
Shooting In Rome: Jessica travels to Rome to help with the film adaptation of one of her novels. But she soon finds herself investigating a murder scene when a member of the cast is killed.
Deadly Bidding: Jessica becomes embroiled in the New York art scene when she attempts to buy an alleged Sir Arthur Conan Doyle manuscript. Will a stolen painting ultimately lead to murder?
Frozen Stiff: Jessica investigates the murder of a company accountant. Can she find a murderer and $750,000 stolen from the business's literacy foundation?
Unwilling Witness: Jessica is surprised when she is summoned to testify before a federal grand jury. Can she find a murderer after she is charged with contempt of court?
Kendo Killing: Jessica travels to Japan to conduct a series of lectures at a local university. Can she solve the murder of a motorcycle racer?
Death Goes Double Platinum: Jessica becomes embroiled in the music industry when she attempts to help an up-and-coming band. But will a New York mobster get his own way?
Murder In Tempo: Jessica investigates when a musician's murder disrupts preparations for a benefit concert organised by Dr Hazlitt.
Dark Side Of The Door: Jessica is alerted to the similarities of a new novel and her friend's kidnapping over a decade before. Can Jessica establish a link and prove her friend's innocence?
Murder Among Friends: Jessica investigates when the producer of a popular television programme is murdered. But with a full cast of suspects, can Jessica find a killer?
Something Foul In Floppieville: Jessica investigates when a murderer strikes on the set of a children's television programme.
...Of Murder: Detective drama with Lori Loughlin. While organising a charity event, intrepid second-hand sleuth Jennifer must dust off the clues when a generous donor meets an untimely end. (2016)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
...Of Murder: Detective drama with Lori Loughlin. While organising a charity event, intrepid second-hand sleuth Jennifer must dust off the clues when a generous donor meets an untimely end. (2016)
